message:
Add restart button for each agent on the dashboard (#136)

Adds a restart/respawn button (↻ restart) next to the existing pause and
terminal buttons on each agent card. Clicking it shows a confirmation dialog,
then calls POST /api/restart/:agent which runs tmux kill-session. The
supervised-agent systemd service detects the session died and respawns it
with a fresh context.

- New CSS class .restart-btn styled consistently with .terminal-link (yellow)
- New restartAgent() JS function with confirm() dialog
- New /api/restart/:agent endpoint in server.js

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
